mapper.select: SELECT id, title, completed, priority FROM todos ORDER BY id

SELECT id, title, completed, priority FROM todos ORDER BY
CASE priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 ELSE 2 END, id
id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (title, completed, priority) VALUES (#{title}, #{completed}, #{priority})
